name: NYC Events
refresh: updated by NYC agencies as public events are posted
notes: Official citywide events surface. Directory-only until a stable location-bearing feed is confirmed.

name: NYC Service
refresh: updated by NYC Service and participating organizations
notes: Official volunteer, civic service, and in-kind donation portal. Directory-only until individual opportunities include location data.

name: NYC Mayor's Community Affairs Unit
refresh: updated by the Mayor's Community Affairs Unit
notes: Community announcements, neighborhood initiatives, and events in your area. Directory-only until location-bearing records are available.

name: NYC Parks Events
refresh: updated by NYC Parks as events are posted
notes: Parks, recreation, nature, volunteer, and community gathering events. Server-side requests currently degrade with access restrictions.

name: NYC Community Boards
refresh: updated by community boards and the Mayor's Community Affairs Unit
notes: Official local public meetings, hearings, and neighborhood civic events. Directory-only until per-board location-bearing feeds are mapped.

name: City of Los Angeles Calendar
refresh: updated by the City of Los Angeles
notes: Official hub for government, cultural, recreation, library, El Pueblo, and major civic calendars. Directory-only until location-bearing records are available.

name: LA Department of Cultural Affairs Events
refresh: updated by LA Department of Cultural Affairs
notes: Cultural/community celebrations, heritage months, public art, workshops, festivals, talks, and city department events.

name: LA Recreation and Parks Events
refresh: updated by LA Recreation and Parks
notes: Youth, adult, family, recreation, park, and community-gathering events. Server-side requests currently degrade with access restrictions.

name: Los Angeles Public Library Events
refresh: updated by Los Angeles Public Library
notes: Library programs, exhibits, celebrations, senior/teen/adult events, and community education.

name: LA Neighborhood Council Meetings
refresh: updated by neighborhood councils and the City of Los Angeles
notes: Official local civic meeting calendar for Los Angeles neighborhood councils. Directory-only until location-bearing records are available.
